website_boundary: render-only reviewer route; not proof authority
badge_boundary: workflow-status indicator only; not proof authority

artifacts.role: Platform ledger SQLite seed bridge for the Lifetime Case Ledger v1 count spine.
artifacts.authority_boundary: Platform source and seed bridge state only; not runtime truth, not signal truth, not public proof.
artifacts.evidence_preservation_requirement: Preserve as the platform ledger evidence target. No append, rewrite, delete, move, archive, or rename is allowed in this phase.
artifacts.reason: The proof summary and bundle depend on the platform ledger count state derived from this seed bridge.

artifacts.role: Phase 8 state manifest for ledger counts, appended detections, six-repo anchors, and blocked-claim boundaries.
artifacts.authority_boundary: Platform manifest source truth only; not runtime truth, not signal truth, not public proof.
artifacts.evidence_preservation_requirement: Preserve as the pinned platform input for proof-owned Phase 9 and Phase 10 verifiers.
artifacts.reason: This manifest is the source-controlled state anchor checked by the proof summary and bundle verifiers.

artifacts.role: Phase 9 proof-owned public summary for bounded ledger counts and boundary status.
artifacts.authority_boundary: Proof-owned bounded summary; ledger status remains NOT_PUBLIC_SAFE and proof ceiling remains SCHEMA_CONTRACT_VERIFIER_EXISTS_ONLY.
artifacts.evidence_preservation_requirement: Preserve as the canonical proof-owned public summary reference for downstream badge and website routing.
artifacts.reason: This is the canonical source for total_ledger_events=4, total_cases=4, public_safe_count=0, closed_case_count=0, and appended detections.

artifacts.role: Phase 10 proof bundle tying the proof summary to the pinned platform manifest and reviewer steps.

artifacts.evidence_preservation_requirement: Preserve as the canonical six-repo ledger proof bundle source.
artifacts.reason: This bundle packages the proof summary, platform manifest reference, verifiers, and review boundaries.

artifacts.role: Phase 11 badge documentation and reviewer route for Lifetime Case Ledger verifier jobs.
